# Release Notes - Mal.MdkScriptMixin.Coroutines

````````text
- 1.0.4
  CRITICAL FIX: Removed invalid packageType that prevented package installation
- 1.0.3
  Test release to verify project URL now points to library subfolder instead of repository root
- 1.0.2
  Initial public release
  - Core coroutine scheduler with update frequency management
  - When conditions: NextUpdate, TimePassed, True, Completed
  - Cancellation token support
  - ForEach helper for processing collections over multiple ticks
````````
